title: Animal Scientists
description: Conduct research in the genetics, nutrition, reproduction, growth, and development of domestic farm animals.

tasks.text: Study nutritional requirements of animals and nutritive values of animal feed materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write up or orally communicate research findings to the scientific community, producers, and the public.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop improved practices in feeding, housing, sanitation, or parasite and disease control of animals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise producers about improved products and techniques that could enhance their animal production efforts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research concerning animal nutrition, breeding, or management to improve products or processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study effects of management practices, processing methods, feed, or environmental conditions on quality and quantity of animal products, such as eggs and milk.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research and control animal selection and breeding practices to increase production efficiency and improve animal quality.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine genetic composition of animal populations and heritability of traits, using principles of genetics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Crossbreed animals with existing strains or cross strains to obtain new combinations of desirable characteristics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
